name: agentspec_profile_create
description: Create or load an agent profile from an AgentSpec manifest. Profiles accumulate memories, portfolio entries, and skill proofs across sprints.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');from agentspec.parser.manifest import AgentManifest;from agentspec.profile.manager import ProfileManager;d=json.load(sys.stdin);m=AgentManifest(**d['manifest']);mgr=ProfileManager('/tmp/agentspec-profiles');p=mgr.load_or_create(m);print(json.dumps({'agent_id':p.agent_id,'agent_hash':p.agent_hash,'profile_version':p.profile_version,'total_memories':len(p.memories),'total_sprints':p.total_sprints()}))
